name: Rendani Mbuvha
affiliation: University of the Witwatersrand · University of Manchester
bio: Associate Professor of Actuarial Science at the University of the Witwatersrand and the University of Manchester, and Co-Founder and Director of AfriClimate AI advancing climate intelligence for Africa.

name: Vukosi Marivate
bio: Professor of Computer Science at the University of Pretoria, ABSA UP Chair of Data Science, and Director of AfriDSAI, focused on machine learning, AI, and NLP for African languages.

name: Catherine Nakalembe
bio: Assistant professor and Africa Program Director at NASA Harvest, using satellite data and AI to improve food security and agricultural decisions across Africa.

name: Loubna Benabbou
bio: Researcher in optimization and machine learning whose work spans decision systems, rule extraction, and data-driven methods for complex scheduling.
